venues.name: Sheesh Mahal
venues.description: Dine under a ceiling of hand-cut Belgian mirrors. Sheesh Mahal serves historic Mewar recipes passed down through generations, reimagined by our chefs with edible gold accents, wild forest herbs, and organic local ingredients.

menu.name: Mewari Kesar Maas
menu.description: Tender grass-fed lamb slow-cooked in a yogurt and saffron sauce, infused with local hill spices and dry red chilies.

menu.name: Shahi Paneer Paneer Ke Tukde
menu.description: Cottage cheese medallions stuffed with organic dry fruits, marinated in hand-ground cardamom cream.

menu.name: Gold-Leaf Rabri Mille-Feuille
menu.description: Layers of crisp puff pastry, saffron rabri, roasted pistachios, finished with 24-karat edible gold foil.

venues.name: The Royal Lounge
venues.description: Set inside the marble pavilion, the salon serves hand-picked loose-leaf teas from Darjeeling, alongside French pastries with a unique local cardamom twist.

menu.name: Grand High Tea Stand
menu.description: freshly baked rosewater scones, cucumber mint sandwiches, saffron macarons, served with private single-estate tea selections.

chef.name: Executive Chef Devendra Singh
chef.title: Master of Heritage Gastronomy
chef.bio: With 25 years of culinary expertise, Chef Devendra has dedicated his career to restoring lost recipes from Mewar's historic royal kitchens. He sources wild forest honey and organic spices directly from local communities, crafting bespoke dining experiences.
